response.justification: Candidate is a solid full-stack engineer with ~13-14 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but falls significantly short of the Principal/Director-level IC bar required for this role. There is no evidence of building AI products at scale, recognized AI expertise, advanced AI/ML degree, or strategic leadership advising customers and partners on cutting-edge cloud/AI adoption. Skillset skews toward web/full-stack and DLang niche work rather than cloud platform or AI platform strategy.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded
Recent exposure to AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Strong craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, open-source contributions, teaching/workshops
concerns: Below 15-year requirement and no Principal/Staff-level strategic IC track record
No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized expertise in AI
Lacks cloud platform depth (no AWS/GCP/Azure architecture leadership) and advanced AI degree

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI products
Insufficient seniority for Director-level IC scope
